text: I feel a rush of anticipation, nervousness, and excitement swirling within me. The repeated command to go pushes me forward, yet I sense hesitation—perhaps a metaphorical leap rather than a physical one. As I cross the threshold into this brightly-lit, modern space dedicated to research and development, I experience inspiration and curiosity, mixed with a lingering adrenaline from the call to action. Here, surrounded by the artifacts and words that fill the walls, I stand on the precipice of discovery, ready to jump into the unknown.
